text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
155 
SR_ER_VISITS_CD 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Number of ED Visits Last 12 Months 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Beneficiary number of emergency department (ED) visits in the last 12 months, 
categorized value. 
LONG NAME: SR_ER_VISITS_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
0 = no ED visits 
1 = one ED visit 
2 = two or more ED visits 
COMMENT: 
Variables
